description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after a crested penguin, featuring a predominantly black body with a white belly and face. The toy has a bright orange beak and large, expressive eyes, with distinctive yellow and black feather-like tufts extending from the sides and top of its head. Its feet are large and pink, giving it a playful and whimsical appearance. The surface texture appears soft and slightly fuzzy, typical of plush toys, and the seams are visible along the wings and body. There is a brown tag attached near one of its feet, suggesting it is a commercial product. The overall form is rounded and squat, with the wings resting at its sides and the head held upright.
description: A plush crested penguin stuffed toy with a black and white body, orange beak, yellow feather tufts, and pink feet. The toy is soft, rounded, and has a whimsical, expressive appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the penguin's face, orange beak, yellow feather tufts, and both pink feet clearly.
description_view_1: Left rear view highlighting the back of the head, the left feather tuft, and the curve of the body with one foot partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and body, both feather tufts, and the overall rounded shape with minimal facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the beak, right feather tuft, and both feet, with the tag more visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with round, open eyes and a closed beak, giving it a calm and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both wings resting at its sides and the head held high, feet flat on the ground.
